channel.title: AI Shots Daily Briefing
channel.itunes:author: AI Shots
channel.itunes:summary: Daily automated 5-minute summaries of the top 10 latest artificial intelligence news, machine learning breakthroughs, and startup fundings.
channel.description: Daily automated 5-minute summaries of the top 10 latest artificial intelligence news, machine learning breakthroughs, and startup fundings.

item.title: AI Shots Daily Briefing - June 30, 2026
item.itunes:author: AI Shots
item.description: Here is your daily AI Shots briefing. Today's top stories: HP accelerates enterprise workflows with OpenAI Frontier Frontier. Taiwan raids Super Micro offices in probe. Why do South Koreans love AI so much?. A startup claims it broke through a bottleneck. Anthropic’s latest feud with the government continues. OpenAI's Jalapeño chip was created by an algorithm. US military used AI to pick thousands. Meta restricts use of Claude Code and Codex. XAI fired engineer who raised alarms about Grok. Amazon borrows $17.5B from banks as AI spending.

item.title: AI Shots Daily Briefing - June 29, 2026
item.itunes:author: AI Shots
item.description: Here is your daily AI Shots briefing. Today's top stories: Claude Code runs GitHub repo's hidden malware without. XAI fired engineer who raised alarms about Grok. Amazon borrows $17.5B from banks as AI spending. Google just redesigned the search box. Only three AI models finished above starting capital. Samsung and SK Hynix plan $590 billion chip. Computer vision deployments drive retail productivity gains. Omio scales travel product development using OpenAI models. Anthropic drops ‘workplace AI agents’ directly inside Slack. Samsung opens ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex access after.

item.title: AI Shots Daily Briefing - June 27, 2026
item.itunes:author: AI Shots
item.description: Here is your daily AI Shots briefing. Today's top stories: OpenAI launches Claude Mythos rival GPT-5.6 Sol. Why do South Koreans love AI so much?. A startup claims it broke through a bottleneck. Anthropic’s latest feud with the government continues. The emergence of the web data infrastructure layer. XAI fired engineer who raised alarms about Grok. Amazon borrows $17.5B from banks as AI spending. Google just redesigned the search box. China Opens World’s First Wind-Powered Underwater Data Center. There’s Finally Video of a Great White Shark.

item.title: AI Shots Daily Briefing - June 26, 2026
item.itunes:author: AI Shots
item.description: Here is your daily AI Shots briefing. Today's top stories: Anthropic warns of an economic shock when other. Lindy ditched Claude entirely for Deepseek, saving millions. Grok AI is reportedly a porn platform now. Insurers turn to AI for catastrophe modeling, but. Linux Foundation and 20 tech giants launch Akrites. XAI fired engineer who raised alarms about Grok. Amazon borrows $17.5B from banks as AI spending. Google just redesigned the search box. Altman won't go public for less than $1. AI model programmed nonstop for 19 days.

item.title: AI Shots Daily Briefing - June 25, 2026
item.itunes:author: AI Shots
item.description: Here is your daily AI Shots briefing. Today's top stories: Cursor announces its own AI model, a new. ByteDance's Seedance 2.5 breaks the 30-second barrier. Mistral's new OCR model beats competitors in 72. Claude Tag embeds Anthropic's AI in Slack, already. XAI fired engineer who raised alarms about Grok. Amazon borrows $17.5B from banks as AI spending. Google just redesigned the search box. Anthropic drops ‘workplace AI agents’ directly inside Slack. China Opens World’s First Wind-Powered Underwater Data Center. There’s Finally Video of a Great White Shark.

item.title: AI Shots Daily Briefing - June 23, 2026
item.itunes:author: AI Shots
item.description: Here is your daily AI Shots briefing. Today's top stories: OpenAI says new GPT-5.5-Cyber outperforms Anthropic. Vibecoding is becoming a deal-breaker test for software. Five Eyes intelligence alliance says frontier AI models. Getty Images strikes multi-year deal to put licensed. XAI fired engineer who raised alarms about Grok. Amazon borrows $17.5B from banks as AI spending. Google just redesigned the search box. Top spy agencies say AI cyber threats will. Omio scales travel product development using OpenAI models. Anthropic and Micron want to co-design AI memory.

item.title: AI Shots Daily Briefing - June 21, 2026
item.itunes:author: AI Shots
item.description: Here is your daily AI Shots briefing. Today's top stories: XAI fired engineer who raised alarms about Grok. Amazon borrows $17.5B from banks as AI spending. Google just redesigned the search box. New benchmark exposes how badly AI struggles. More people get news from AI chatbots, but. Amazon drops its OpenAI drama film after signing. Google Deepmind loses another top AI researcher. China Opens World’s First Wind-Powered Underwater Data Center. There’s Finally Video of a Great White Shark. Alleged China ties at SK Telecom alarmed US.
